ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* The referring URL that led the user to the Watsi platform */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The exact time when the session occurred */,
  "title" TEXT /* The title of the webpage visited */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL of the webpage visited */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string representing the device and browser used */,
  "referrer_domain" INTEGER /* The domain of the referrer URL */,
  "website_section" INTEGER /* The section of the website visited */,
  "platform" INTEGER /* The platform used by the user (Desktop, Mobile, etc.) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* The city of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* The operating system of the user */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* The browser version used */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the session in seconds */,
  "user_agent_details" TEXT /* Additional details from the user agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_referrer_domain FOREIGN KEY ("referrer_domain") REFERENCES referrer_domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_platform FOREIGN KEY ("platform") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_website_section FOREIGN KEY ("website_section") REFERENCES website_sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last active on the platform */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the user account */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrer_domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referrer domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the referrer domain */,
  "domain_type" TEXT /* Type of the referrer domain */,
  "traffic_source" TEXT /* Source of the traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "website_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section on the Watsi platform */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of the section */,
  "section_description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "platform_version" TEXT /* Version of the platform */,
  "platform_type" TEXT /* Type of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of pages viewed during the session */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate for the session */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks during the session */,
  "scroll_depth" REAL /* Average scroll depth during the session */,
  "interactions" INTEGER /* Number of interactions during the session */,
  "conversion_event" TEXT /* Type of conversion event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Goal of the campaign */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
